# Microprocessors (E155) Projects


::: {.media-content}
## FPGA and MCU Setup and Testing (Lab 1)


*Coming Soon!*
:::

::: {.media-content}
## Multiplexed 7-Segment Display (Lab 2)


*Coming Soon!*
:::

::: {.media-content}

## Keypad Scanner (Lab 3)


*Coming Soon!*
:::

::: {.media-content}

## Digital Audio (Lab 4)


*Coming Soon!*
:::

::: {.media-content}
## Interrupts (Lab 5)


*Coming Soon!*
:::

::: {.media-content}
## SPI and IoT (Lab 6)


*Coming Soon!*
:::

::: {.media-content}
## Advanced Encryption Standard (Lab 7)


*Coming Soon!*
:::
